description.ko: 유기적인 생물학적 구조와 디지털 정보의 교차점을 탐구하며, 코드와 빛으로 피어나는 꽃을 묘사합니다.
description.en: An exploration of the intersection between organic biological structures and digital information, where flowers bloom from code and light.

prompt: Hyper-realistic macro photography of a digital orchid with translucent petals made of flowing data streams, glowing fiber-optic stamens, pulsing circuit-board veins, set in a dark holographic forest, ethereal bokeh, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, neon cyan and soft violet color palette.
